channel.title: Llm-Tokens on gograph – Go Codebase Analysis & MCP Server
channel.description: Recent content in Llm-Tokens on gograph – Go Codebase Analysis & MCP Server

item.title: Analyzing a Go Codebase with gograph — Starting with Itself
item.description: A deep-dive technical case study running gograph's static analysis engine on its own codebase. Discover how structural call-graph intelligence eliminates LLM token waste, tracks precise blast radii, and out-performs standard grep.
